summary: Iteration 35 - Comprehensive testing of multiple fixes: Role creation, Salary field mapping, Inspection packages inactive display, Copy buttons, Reporting Manager dropdown, Document download. All backend tests passed (10/10). All frontend features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Net Salary calculation in AdminPage.jsx was using wrong field names (conveyance/medical instead of conveyance_allowance/medical_allowance) - corrected during testing
seed_data_creation: Created test roles with codes: TEST_ROLE_*, TEST_DUP_*, TEST_UPD_*, UI_TEST_4088
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 35 are working correctly. Backend POST /api/roles creates roles successfully. Salary fields use correct names (conveyance_allowance, medical_allowance, income_tax). Inspection packages/categories show inactive items with badges. Copy buttons work on roles and packages. Reporting Manager dropdown populated with employees. Document download works with authentication.

backend: POST /api/roles - Rejects duplicate role codes with 400
GET /api/hr/employees - Returns employee list for reporting manager dropdown
frontend: Role modal opens and creates new roles
Role cards have Copy button that duplicates role with '(Copy)' suffix
Inspection packages show inactive items with 'Inactive' badge
Inspection packages have Copy button (no Delete button)
Categories tab shows Copy and Toggle buttons
Employee modal shows Reporting Manager dropdown with employee list
Salary tab shows correct field names (Conveyance, Medical Allowance, Income Tax)
Documents tab shows download icons for uploaded documents

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Net Salary calculation used wrong field names (conveyance/medical instead of conveyance_allowance/medical_allowance)
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Updated line 2600-2601 to use correct field names
